name: Three-Eyed Ghost
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>三</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>眼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can send this card from the field to the GY; add 1 Level 10 DARK monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Three-Eyed Ghost" once per turn.

eff: You can send this card from the field to the GY; add 1 Level 10 DARK monster from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Three-Eyed Ghost" once per turn.
